sentence_reviews.text: Speculative and assisted decoding propose multiple future tokens with a cheaper process and verify them in parallel with the target model.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Chen et al. describe speculative sampling using an approximation model to generate candidate tokens and the target model to verify multiple tokens in parallel.
sentence_reviews.notes: Directly supported by the speculative sampling paper.

sentence_reviews.text: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Model servers & inference runtimes, Autoregressive decoding.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Speculative, parallel & assisted decoding is modeled as depending on Model servers & inference runtimes, Autoregressive decoding and feeding downstream nodes such as Large language models, Conversational assistants & chatbots.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: data/atlas.json canonical node and dependency graph; generated from node dependencies and downstream consumers.
sentence_reviews.notes: This is an explicit internal atlas-graph positioning claim, not an external-world necessity claim.
